title: lamium album subsp. transcaucasicum
intro: Lamium album subsp. transcaucasicum, also known as White Betony or Caucasian White Betony, is a subspecies of the White Betony plant, which is a perennial herb native to the Caucasus region. The plant is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and antiseptic qualities, making it useful in treating various health issues such as headaches, fever, and digestive problems. The health benefits of Lamium album subsp. transcaucasicum include reducing stress and anxiety, promoting relaxation, and improving sleep quality, as well as exerting antimicrobial effects against bacteria and fungi. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, and are often used in traditional medicine to treat a range of ailments.
